field.label: Instance
field.help: The Nebula instance this route belongs to.

field.label: Destination CIDR
field.help: The non-Nebula destination network (e.g. 172.16.1.0/24) to route over the overlay.

field.label: Via (Nebula IP)
field.help: The overlay IP of the Nebula peer that hosts this route. That peer's certificate must include the destination as a subnet.

field.label: MTU
field.help: Optional MTU for this route. Defaults to the tunnel MTU when empty.

field.label: Metric
field.help: Optional route metric (defaults to 0 when empty).

field.label: Install in system route table
field.help: Install this route into the host routing table. Disable to let Nebula handle it internally only.

field.label: Description
field.help: Optional human-readable label for this route.
